page.purpose: Toolbar / view titles. Same size as body; weight does the work.

title.purpose: Detail pane headings, row primary text.

meta.purpose: Secondary row lines, timestamps, helper copy.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Ease-out-quart for state transitions (150–250ms). No bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Harbor Slate compact CTA — tight radius, Linear-like density.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(0.218 0.008 223.9); color: oklch(0.987 0.002 197.1); font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.218 0.008 223.9 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.925 0.005 214.3); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.963 0.002 197.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.3); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action with no chrome at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.25rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.963 0.002 197.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.3); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Soft-fill risk action; saturation only for danger.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Hairline border field for paste-a-charge / message input.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.375rem; font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); } .ds-input { height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.925 0.005 214.3); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.56 0.021 213.5); opacity: 1; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.3); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Surface Panel
components.description: Flat container with hairline border — no shadow. Prefer list+detail over boxed cards.
components.html:
Likely scam

This message asks you to move money urgently. Do not reply or click links.
components.css: .ds-panel { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.925 0.005 214.3); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 550; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); text-wrap: balance; } .ds-panel-body { margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.56 0.021 213.5); text-wrap: pretty; }

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Quiet path chrome in Ink Muted.
components.html:
1. Home
  3. Check
components.css: .ds-breadcrumb { font-family: "Geist Variable", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-breadcrumb-list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.56 0.021 213.5); } .ds-breadcrumb-link { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-breadcrumb-link:hover { color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); } .ds-breadcrumb-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.3); border-radius: 0.25rem; } .ds-breadcrumb-sep { display: inline-flex; color: oklch(0.56 0.021 213.5); } .ds-breadcrumb-current { color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview:
Noscam’s visual system is a calm product surface for watching transaction risk. The UI should feel like a steady colleague: clear hierarchy, plain language, no drama. Density is Linear-like — compact chrome, issue-list rows, quiet toolbars — not marketing whitespace. Structure and typography do the work, not decoration.

Color is Harbor Slate — cool blue-gray ink on white — money-serious without bank-app theater. Elevation is flat: tonal layers and hairline borders, never lift for its own sake. Components are refined and restrained: tight corner radii, compact controls, quiet hover, focus rings that earn trust for keyboard users.

This system explicitly rejects loud cybersecurity / red-alert threat theater, bloated personal-finance dashboards, and generic SaaS marketing (purple gradients, feature-card grids, startup hype).
keyCharacteristics: Single sans (Geist Variable) across UI — no display pairing
Restrained cool neutrals; saturation reserved for risk/destructive
Flat tonal depth; no decorative shadows
Linear-like density: compact sidebar, toolbar page titles, dense list rows, sticky detail pane
Tight radii (Linear-like 4px controls); no pill buttons; focus ring as the main interaction signal
One job per screen — Connect sources, score transactions

rules.name: The Soft Signal Rule
rules.body: Saturation is for risk and error only. Harbor Slate and neutrals carry the UI; never paint inactive chrome in alert red or neon “security” accents.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary fill (Harbor Slate) appears on ≤10% of any screen — primary CTA and selected emphasis. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product type uses fixed rem steps. No fluid clamp() headings in app chrome. No oversized page titles — Linear density means page = body size, semibold.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Geist Variable for everything. No serif display, no mono-for-flavor in labels.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No multi-layer shadows, no glassmorphism, no glow. Hierarchy = tone + border + spacing.

rules.name: The Dense Chrome Rule
rules.body: Sidebar nav ~28px tall, toolbars ~44px, list rows compact with hairline dividers. Prefer full-bleed list + sticky detail over centered marketing layouts.

rules.name: The Linear Radius Rule
rules.body: Fixed radius scale: sm 2px, md 4px (default controls), lg 6px, xl 8px. Cap at 8px. No pills, no soft multiplicative Tailwind radius inflation.

dos: Do keep every screen answering one job: connect sources or score transactions.
Do use Harbor Slate + cool neutrals; reserve saturation for risk/error.
Do meet WCAG 2.2 AA — body/placeholder contrast ≥4.5:1; large text ≥3:1; keyboard + prefers-reduced-motion.
Do use compact tight-radius controls and quiet hover; let the focus ring carry accessibility.
Do convey depth with tonal layers and hairline borders.
Do prefer Linear-like density: toolbar titles, dense lists, sticky detail — not marketing whitespace.
donts: Don't use loud “cybersecurity” / red-alert threat theater (shields, hacker aesthetics, panic UI).
Don't build bloated personal-finance dashboards (charts everywhere, budgets, net-worth theater).
Don't ship generic SaaS marketing (purple gradients, feature-card grids, startup hype).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/border-right >1px) as accent.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative glow.
Don't invent shadow elevation for cards at rest.
Don't put display fonts or fluid clamp headings in product UI labels.
Don't use pill / fully-rounded buttons or large container radii (rounded-xl+); keep corners tight.
Don't bury a real warning to feel polished — catch over comfort.
